description: Style NoteNail that corporate style with these sharp shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. These oxford shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble.Product DetailsBrown oxford shoe with leather upper, overlays and stitched detailingFive hole lace-up shoePadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
